title: Bayesian PINN (deep ensemble): pollutant diffusion with epistemic uncertainty
governing_equations: c_t = D\,c_{xx},\ c|_{x=0,1}=0,\ c^*=e^{-D\pi^2 t}\sin(\pi x);\ \text{deep ensemble} \to [\text{mean},\ \text{std}]\ \text{(epistemic UQ from sparse noisy sensors)}
expected_band: mean tracks c* (relative-L2 < 5e-2); std small near sensors/walls, larger in data-sparse regions; ~95% 2-sigma calibration

comparison.note_en: The PINN (bayesian-ensemble-uq) field vs the closed-form standard solution, and their pointwise error. Relative-L2 = 1.2%.
comparison.note_es: El campo de la PINN (bayesian-ensemble-uq) frente a la solución estándar de forma cerrada, y su error puntual. L2 relativa = 1.2%.

estimate.question_en: Is the concentration at the checkpoint above the limit, and with what confidence?
estimate.question_es: ¿La concentración en el punto de control supera el límite, y con qué confianza?
estimate.why_en: The ensemble gives the estimate WITH honest error bars: sigma grows exactly where sensors are absent, so the compliance answer carries its own confidence.
estimate.why_es: El ensamble entrega la estimación CON barras de error honestas: sigma crece justo donde no hay sensores, así el veredicto de cumplimiento lleva su propia confianza.
